message:
refactor(core): migrate from tokio-rustls/reqwest to asupersync TLS and HTTP primitives

Replace the tokio-rustls and reqwest dependencies with asupersync's built-in
TLS (rustls-backed) and HTTP/1.1 client, completing another step in the
asupersync runtime consolidation effort. This removes ~5 transitive
dependency trees (quinn, quinn-proto, quinn-udp, lru-slab, webpki-roots)
and eliminates the QUIC transport that reqwest pulled in but was never used.

Dependency changes:
- Workspace: drop `reqwest` and `tokio-rustls` workspace deps entirely.
- frankenterm-core: replace `dep:tokio-rustls` with `asupersync` TLS feature
  flag (`features = ["tls"]`) in both the `[dependencies]` section and the
  `distributed` feature gate. Add `dep:asupersync` to the `distributed`
  feature so TLS primitives are available for peer-to-peer streams.
- frankenterm (CLI): swap `reqwest` for `asupersync` with TLS feature;
  the `distributed` feature no longer needs `dep:tokio-rustls`.
- Cargo.lock reflects the removal of quinn/reqwest TLS sub-trees and the
  addition of x509-parser 0.17 (used by asupersync's cert validation path
  alongside the existing 0.18 used by frankenterm-core directly).

Core library source changes:
- distributed.rs: add `ensure_rustls_provider_installed()` one-time init
  so both server and client TLS config builders work when rustls's
  process-global CryptoProvider is unset. Replace `TlsAcceptor::from()`
  and `TlsConnector::from()` with asupersync wrappers. Replace
  `tokio::net::TcpListener/TcpStream` with `asupersync::net` equivalents.
  Replace `tokio::io::*` traits with `asupersync::io::*` traits in tests.
- storage.rs: replace `tokio::sync::mpsc` with `crate::runtime_compat::mpsc`
  for the actor channel and the backpressure integration tests.
- vendored/mux_client.rs: switch `PaneOutputSubscription` channels and the
  pane-output subscriber factory from `tokio::sync::{mpsc, watch}` to
  `crate::runtime_compat::{mpsc, watch}`.
- web.rs: update SSE rate-limiter error matching from
  `mpsc::error::TrySendError` to `mpsc::TrySendError` to match the
  runtime_compat re-export surface.
- wezterm.rs: replace `tokio::time::Instant` with `std::time::Instant`
  to remove a direct tokio time dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
